title: GRCnext™ Evidence Item
description: A single item in the GRCnext™ evidence ledger. Credit is earned by evidence, not description. No verified evidence, no verified credit.

claim_tested.description: The specific claim this evidence supports.

date_or_period_covered.description: Date or period the evidence covers. ISO 8601 date or a period description.

source_location.description: Where the evidence is held. Do not embed secrets.

applicable_service.description: The critical service the evidence applies to.

freshness_assessment.description: Whether the evidence is current for what it proves.

resulting_credit.description: The credit this evidence supports, if any.

evidence_conversion_action.description: For provisional items, the action that would make the claim verified. Required when verification_status is Provisional.
